title: Mekanism Cardboard Tooltip
description: Mekanism Cardboard Box gets Jade/TOP/WTHIT support.
body:
[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)/[The One Probe](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-one-probe)/[WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit) plugin that shows what Block and Block Entity is inside Mekanism Cardboard Boxes.
When installed alongside [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism), and one of the supported plugins it will add two new sections: "Block" and "Block Entity" to the Cardboard Box tooltip.
If it contains a monster spawner it will also show what mob it spawns.


The tooltip will have information about what block and block entity is inside the cardboard box.
![Cardboard Box (with mod)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/f0fOt5qj/images/09e10ae7fb454fc45cbec77e458eeca24b32fd70.png)


The default Cardboard Box tooltip has been changed to match the one provided in Mekanism 10.5.
![Cardboard Box in Container (with mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/f0fOt5qj/images/2e83272911c4ab7bba1df56405367178448b9f3d.png)


The inspiration behind this mod was the lack of QoL information on Cardboard Boxes. I use them whenever Mekanism is installed to move monster spawners.
But the annoying part is when cardboard boxes pile up the storage network without any information on what they contain.
